spec.expr:
label_replace(
  slskd_server_is_connected{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Server Connected", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_server_is_logged_in{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Server Logged In", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_server_is_connecting{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Server Restarting", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_pending_reconnect{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Pending Reconnect", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_pending_restart{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Pending Restart", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_server_is_connecting{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Server Connecting", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_server_is_logging_in{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Server Logging In", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_server_is_transitioning{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Server Transitioning", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_shares_ready{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Shared Ready", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_shares_faulted{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Shared Faulted", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_shares_scanning{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Shared Scanning", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_vpn_is_connected{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "VPN Connected", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_vpn_is_ready{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "VPN Ready", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_watchdog_is_enabled{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},
  "State", "Watchdog Enabled", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  slskd_watchdog_is_attempting_connection{instance=~"$instance", job=~"$job"},

)

)
